title: Dimensional Coordinates Ratio
description: Ratio between coords of ALL dimensions becomes 1 to 1, including Nether
body: # Dimensional Coordinates Ratio This mod changes ratio between coordinates of ALL dimensions to be 1 to 1, including Nether<->Overworld ratio. This project is basically copy of [this one](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-one-to-one), ported to newer version of minecraft. I am going to update this mod to newer versions of minecraft, and port to other platforms (maybe), sooner or **later**. Feel free to ask for updates in my discord, it should not take too much of my time. ![kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be71a956eb99b7cf5ca41da1cc0df26e5f71e7e_0.webp)
